result.summary: Sendbird’s public developer surface is its Chat Platform API plus Chat SDKs/UIKit and Desk Platform API, all authenticated with a Sendbird API token from the Dashboard (`Settings > Application > General > API tokens`), sent as `Api-Token` for HTTP/API calls.

sendbird_api_token.label: Sendbird API token (master or secondary)
sendbird_api_token.setup: Go to [Sendbird Dashboard](https://dashboard.sendbird.com/), open your app, then navigate to `Settings > Application > General > API tokens` to copy the master token or create a secondary token. Use the master token for token management and signature validation; secondary tokens work for most Platform API calls. Store it in a secret manager or environment variable and never expose it in client-side code.

variables.name: application_id
variables.description: Sendbird application ID used to form the Platform API base URL
